v1_trigger_formula: close > ema20 and close_1d_ago <= ema20_1d_ago and ret_5d > 0
ret_1d >= 0.095 and close_location >= 0.80 and no same-family event in prior 60 trading days
ret_1d >= 0.07 and ret_1d < 0.095 and close_location >= 0.75 and no same-family event in prior 60 trading days
open / prev_close - 1 >= 0.03 and close >= open and close_location >= 0.60
